Home.headline:
Split costs.
Stay friends.
Home.subtitle: One link, no signup. Everyone adds what they paid — Splita handles the math.
Home.title: Split shared costs fast.
Home.description: Split expenses with friends. Simple, instant, no sign-up.
Home.recentDescription: Jump back into a group you opened on this device.
Home.recentEmpty: No recent groups on this device yet.
Home.featureOneBody: Share one group link and let everyone add members and expenses directly.
Home.featureTwoBody: Each group uses one currency for expenses, balances, settlement, and CSV export.
Home.featureThreeBody: Everything important fits on a phone: members, expenses, balances, settlement, and CSV export.

GroupForm.title: Create group
GroupForm.description: Start with a name, choose the group currency, and add optional members. You can add more people after sharing the link.
GroupForm.currencyHint: Choose one currency for the whole group. All expenses and settlements use it.
GroupForm.membersPlaceholder: Type a name and add it

GroupCreated.title: Group created
GroupCreated.description: {name} is ready. Share the link, then continue into the group.
GroupCreated.linkDescription: Anyone with this link can open the group, add expenses, and stay in the same group currency.

GroupPage.shareLinkBody: Share this one link with everyone who should open and edit this group.
GroupPage.expenseFormDescription: Record a new shared expense for this group.
GroupPage.expenseEditDescription: Update this expense and the balances will recalculate immediately.
GroupPage.deleteExpenseHint: Delete this expense if it was entered by mistake or needs to be removed entirely.
GroupPage.expenseNotesPlaceholder: Any note you want to keep in the original language.
GroupPage.emptyMembers: Add at least one member before recording expenses.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesNoMembersBody: This group is ready, but expenses can only start after the first member is added.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesReadyBody: This group has members and is ready for the first expense.
GroupPage.emptyExpensesReadyAction: Use the add expense button to record the first shared cost.
GroupPage.addMemberFirstHint: Add the first member above, then you can record expenses and calculate balances.
GroupPage.balancesIntro: Each balance shows how far each member is from even after all recorded expenses.
GroupPage.settlementIntro: Review the records, compare balances, then use the suggested transfers in the group's currency to settle up.
GroupPage.rawExpensesIntro: These are the source expense entries currently included in the calculation.
GroupPage.recommendedTransfersIntro: These transfers use a simple greedy matching between debtors and creditors.
GroupPage.groupSettlementSummaryBody: This is a lightweight summary of who currently needs to pay whom.
GroupPage.moreSettlementsHint: +{count} more transfers on the settlement page.
GroupPage.shareSummary: {count, plural, one {Split with # person} other {Split with # people}}

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Last updated: April 8, 2026
Privacy.intro: Splita ("we", "our", or "the service") is a lightweight group expense-splitting web application. We believe in collecting as little data as possible. This Privacy Policy explains what data we handle, how we handle it, and your rights.
Privacy.collectIntro: When you use Splita, the following information is stored in our database in order to make the service work:
Privacy.collectItem2: Member names you add to groups
Privacy.collectItem3: Expense entries (title, amount, date, payer, participants, optional notes)
Privacy.collectItem4: The randomly generated group identifier (slug) used in shareable links
Privacy.notCollectIntro: We do not collect or require:
Privacy.notCollectItem1: Names, email addresses, or phone numbers for account creation
Privacy.notCollectItem2: Passwords (Splita has no login or sign-up)
Privacy.localStorageIntro: Splita uses your browser's local storage (localStorage) to remember:
Privacy.localStorageItem1: Your preferred language (English, Japanese, or Chinese)
Privacy.localStorageItem2: A list of groups you have recently visited, so they appear on the home page for convenience
Privacy.localStorageNote: This information stays on your device. You can clear it at any time through your browser settings. Splita does not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
Privacy.storageBody: Group and expense data is stored in a managed PostgreSQL database (Neon) hosted on secure cloud infrastructure. The application is deployed on Vercel. Both providers maintain industry-standard security practices.
Privacy.accessBody: Splita uses single-link collaboration. Anyone with the unique group link can view and edit the group. Group links contain a randomly generated identifier and are not indexed by search engines. Treat your group link like a password and only share it with people you trust.
Privacy.noSellBody: We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties.
Privacy.retentionBody: Group data is retained as long as the group is in active use. We may remove inactive groups after extended periods of inactivity. If you would like your group data deleted immediately, please contact us (see Contact page).
Privacy.childrenBody: Splita is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
Privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent changes.
Privacy.contactBody: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us at ucanshmily@gmail.com.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Last updated: April 8, 2026
Terms.intro: Welcome to Splita. By using this service, you agree to the terms below. Please read them carefully.
Terms.aboutBody: Splita is a free, lightweight web application for splitting shared expenses among groups. It does not require registration. Anyone with a group's shareable link can view and edit that group's contents.
Terms.useIntro: You agree to use Splita only for lawful purposes. You agree not to:
Terms.useItem1: Use the service to record, store, or share any illegal, harmful, abusive, or offensive content
Terms.useItem2: Attempt to disrupt, overload, or compromise the service or its infrastructure
Terms.useItem3: Use automated tools or scrapers to access the service in ways that may degrade performance
Terms.useItem4: Impersonate others or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity
Terms.useItem5: Use the service in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
Terms.dataBody1: You are responsible for the content you enter into Splita, including group names, member names, and expense details. Please do not enter sensitive personal information (such as government IDs, payment card numbers, or passwords).
Terms.dataBody2: Because Splita uses single-link collaboration, anyone with a group's link can see its contents. You are responsible for sharing group links only with trusted parties.
Terms.noAccountBody: Splita does not have user accounts. If you lose a group link and have not saved it elsewhere, we may not be able to help you recover it. We recommend bookmarking important group links or saving them in a secure place.
Terms.availabilityBody: Splita is provided "as is" and "as available." We do our best to keep the service running smoothly, but we make no guarantees about uptime, data preservation, or fitness for any particular purpose. The service may be modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time without notice.
Terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Splita and its operators are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to data loss, financial calculations, or disputes between group members. Splita is a tool to help you track shared expenses; it is not a financial, legal, or accounting service.
Terms.changesBody: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
Terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms, please contact us at ucanshmily@gmail.com.

About.title: About Splita
About.subtitle: A small, focused tool for splitting shared expenses.
About.intro: Splita is a lightweight web app for splitting shared expenses in a group — built for the moments when you and your friends just need to track who paid for what, without anyone having to download an app or sign up for an account.
About.whyBody1: Most expense-splitting apps assume everyone in the group will install software, create an account, and learn a new interface. That works for some groups. But for one-off trips, casual dinners, or short collaborations, asking everyone to sign up is too much friction.
About.whyBody2: Splita takes a different approach: one person creates a group, gets a shareable link, and sends it to the rest. Everyone who opens the link can add expenses, view balances, and see who owes whom. No download, no login, no account.
About.whatItem1Body: Create a group in seconds. Share a link. Done.
About.whatItem2Body: Splita works in English, Japanese, and Chinese, designed for people who live across languages.
About.whatItem3Body: Built with Japan in mind. Currency is fixed to Japanese Yen, which keeps the experience focused for trips and groups based around Japan.
About.whatItem4Body: The interface is designed to work well on phones, because that's where most expense-splitting actually happens.
About.whatItem5Body: Anyone with the link can edit. No permission systems, no roles, no friction.
About.notBody: Splita is not a bank, a payment processor, or a financial service. It does not move money. It is a tool for tracking expenses and showing settlement suggestions — the actual transfers happen between you and your group members directly, however you prefer.
About.whoBody: Splita is built and maintained by Kyle, an independent developer based in Japan with a background in digital transformation, AI, and product work. The project started from a simple personal need — splitting expenses on a group trip — and grew into something that other people might find useful too.
About.whoOutro: If Splita has been helpful to you, or if you have feedback, please get in touch.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.intro: Splita is built and maintained by a small team — really, just one person — based in Japan. If you have feedback, run into a bug, want to request a feature, or have any questions about privacy, terms, or how the service works, please reach out.
Contact.whatItem1: Bugs you've encountered while using Splita
Contact.whatItem2: Features you'd like to see added
Contact.whatItem3: Questions about how to use a specific part of the app
Contact.whatItem5: General feedback, suggestions, or kind words
Contact.responseBody: This is an independent project, so responses may take a few days. We read every message and do our best to reply.
Contact.langBody: Feel free to write in English, Japanese, or Chinese — all three are welcome.

Feedback.invalidGroup: Please enter a group name and choose a currency. Member lines can be left blank, but each filled line must be valid.
Feedback.invalidMember: Enter a valid member name before adding someone.
Feedback.invalidExpense: Please complete the expense form and select at least one participant.
Feedback.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount for this group currency.
Feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
